description: Composition:100% cotton round neck red t-shirt with short frilly sleeves and a Pooh printWashcare:Machine wash in cold water with a gentle cycle using mild detergent. Wash dark colours seperately. Do not bleach. Do not soak nor wring. Dry it inside out. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron on print and studs.Fitting:Comfort FitThis summer, your little girl is all set to pack her picnic bag and set off to the nearby woods with her friends in this red top with frilly short sleeves and a vacationing Pooh with his friend, the Piglet. Brought to you by disney, this top has a small button at the back that holds it in place, making it the ideal summer wear for your princess.
